query: WITH prompt_block_summary AS (SELECT category, count(*) AS total, count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_active IS TRUE) AS active, count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_active IS NOT TRUE) AS inactive, count(*) FILTER (WHERE prompt_content IS NULL OR length(trim(prompt_content)) = 0) AS empty_content, min(priority) AS min_priority, max(priority) AS max_priority FROM prompt_blocks GROUP BY category ORDER BY category), active_prompt_blocks AS (SELECT block_id, category, priority, length(prompt_content) AS content_length, left(prompt_content, 250) AS content_excerpt, conditions FROM prompt_blocks WHERE is_active IS TRUE ORDER BY category, priority DESC, block_id LIMIT 80), duplicate_prompt_blocks AS (SELECT block_id, count(*) AS row_count, count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_active IS TRUE) AS active_count FROM prompt_blocks GROUP BY block_id HAVING count(*) > 1 OR count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_active IS TRUE) > 1 ORDER BY row_count DESC, block_id LIMIT 50), static_section_summary AS (SELECT location_id, count(*) AS total, count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_active IS TRUE) AS active, count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_active IS NOT TRUE) AS inactive, count(*) FILTER (WHERE content IS NULL OR length(trim(content)) = 0) AS empty_content, min(sort_order) AS min_sort_order, max(sort_order) AS max_sort_order FROM static_prompt_sections GROUP BY location_id ORDER BY location_id), static_sections_sample AS (SELECT location_id, section_key, heading, sort_order, is_active, length(content) AS content_length, left(content, 250) AS content_excerpt FROM static_prompt_sections ORDER BY location_id, sort_order, section_key LIMIT 100), default_state AS (SELECT key, length(value) AS value_length, left(value, 250) AS value_excerpt, description, updated_at FROM system_defaults WHERE key ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['%personality%','%prompt%','%system%','%default%']) ORDER BY key), agent_prompt_state AS (SELECT id, location_id, agent_name, active, use_custom_personality, length(coalesce(personality_prompt,'')) AS personality_prompt_length, length(coalesce(agent_notes,'')) AS agent_notes_length, coalesce(coordinator_name,'') AS coordinator_name, coalesce(timezone,'') AS timezone, calendar_id IS NOT NULL AND length(calendar_id) > 0 AS has_calendar_id, ghl_user_id IS NOT NULL AND length(ghl_user_id) > 0 AS has_ghl_user_id, updated_at FROM agents ORDER BY active DESC NULLS LAST, updated_at DESC NULLS LAST), agent_location_static_health AS (SELECT a.location_id, a.agent_name, a.active, count(s.id) FILTER (WHERE s.is_active IS TRUE) AS active_static_sections, count(s.id) FILTER (WHERE s.content IS NULL OR length(trim(s.content)) = 0) AS empty_static_sections FROM agents a LEFT JOIN static_prompt_sections s ON s.location_id = a.location_id GROUP BY a.location_id, a.agent_name, a.active ORDER BY a.active DESC NULLS LAST, a.location_id), recent_context_health AS (SELECT contact_id, location_id, length(coalesce(conversation_summary,'')) AS conversation_summary_length, length(coalesce(summary,'')) AS summary_length, lead_intent, lead_timeline, appointment_offered, appointment_booked, newsletter_offer_pending, intent_qualifier_pending, updated_at FROM conversation_context ORDER BY updated_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50), ai_error_summary AS (SELECT count(*) AS total_errors, count(*) FILTER (WHERE raw_output ILIKE '%internal%' OR raw_output ILIKE '%reasoning%' OR raw_output ILIKE '%system prompt%' OR raw_output ILIKE '%instruction%') AS likely_prompt_leaks, max(created_at) AS most_recent_error FROM ai_output_errors) SELECT jsonb_build_object('audit_generated_at', now(), 'counts', jsonb_build_object('prompt_blocks', (SELECT count(*) FROM prompt_blocks), 'active_prompt_blocks', (SELECT count(*) FROM prompt_blocks WHERE is_active IS TRUE), 'static_prompt_sections', (SELECT count(*) FROM static_prompt_sections), 'active_static_prompt_sections', (SELECT count(*) FROM static_prompt_sections WHERE is_active IS TRUE), 'system_defaults', (SELECT count(*) FROM system_defaults), 'agents', (SELECT count(*) FROM agents), 'active_agents', (SELECT count(*) FROM agents WHERE active IS TRUE), 'conversation_context', (SELECT count(*) FROM conversation_context), 'ai_output_errors', (SELECT count(*) FROM ai_output_errors)), 'prompt_block_summary', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(prompt_block_summary)) FROM prompt_block_summary), '[]'::jsonb), 'active_prompt_blocks_sample', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(active_prompt_blocks)) FROM active_prompt_blocks), '[]'::jsonb), 'duplicate_prompt_blocks', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(duplicate_prompt_blocks)) FROM duplicate_prompt_blocks), '[]'::jsonb), 'static_section_summary', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(static_section_summary)) FROM static_section_summary), '[]'::jsonb), 'static_sections_sample', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(static_sections_sample)) FROM static_sections_sample), '[]'::jsonb), 'system_default_prompt_state', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(default_state)) FROM default_state), '[]'::jsonb), 'agent_prompt_state', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(agent_prompt_state)) FROM agent_prompt_state), '[]'::jsonb), 'agent_location_static_health', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(agent_location_static_health)) FROM agent_location_static_health), '[]'::jsonb), 'recent_context_health', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(recent_context_health)) FROM recent_context_health), '[]'::jsonb), 'ai_error_summary', (SELECT to_jsonb(ai_error_summary) FROM ai_error_summary)) AS llm_injection_audit;
